app.cmd_drive_info: Show drive hardware and profile match
app.cmd_disc_info: Show disc titles, streams, and sizes
app.cmd_remux: Convert m2ts to MKV (no drive needed)
app.cmd_update_keys: Download and update KEYDB.cfg (only needed for UHD / AACS 2.0+ discs)
app.opt_keydb: Path to KEYDB.cfg (optional; only required for UHD / AACS 2.0+ discs)
app.opt_raw: Output raw m2ts instead of MKV

drive.share_hint: Run 'freemkv drive-info --share' to help expand drive support.
drive.share_desc: Capture and submit drive profile to expand drive support
drive.submit_manual: To contribute this profile, open a new issue and paste the text below:
drive.submit_issue_body: Issue body (copy everything between the lines):

rip.cannot_rip_no_keys: Cannot rip — this disc needs AACS keys and no key source provided them.
rip.no_data: No data recovered — the entire disc was unreadable ({unreadable} MB). Output not usable.
rip.resuming: Resuming: {size} GB already written, starting at sector {sector}
rip.verbose_handshake_hint: Handshake may have failed — no host cert, or drive rejected
rip.mapfile_summary: Mapfile: {good} GB good, {unreadable} MB unreadable, {pending} MB pending
rip.nothing_to_patch: Nothing to patch — all sectors are good
rip.patch_start: Patching: {good} GB good, {unreadable} MB unreadable, {pending} MB pending
rip.patch_done: Patch done: recovered {recovered} MB, {unreadable} MB unreadable, {pending} MB pending ({time}s, {speed} MB/s)
rip.multipass_ignored: Note: --multipass is ignored for disc->MKV/M2TS (single-pass mux). Use an iso:// output for multipass recovery.

dir.complete: Extracted {files} files ({size} MB) — tree is complete
dir.lossy: Extracted {files} files but {lost} MB were unreadable/undecryptable. Recover with disc->iso --multipass, then iso->dir.

remux.scan_failed: Could not detect streams. Is this a valid BD m2ts file?
remux.same_path: Output path same as input. Specify a different output file.

verify.only_disc: Verify only works with disc:// URLs.

error.fatal_diagnostic_hint: For a diagnostic log, re-run with --log-level 3 (writes ./log.txt).
error.no_drive: No BD drive found. Use disc:///dev/sgN
error.no_titles: No titles found on the disc — it may be blank, unsupported, or not yet readable.
error.raw_mux_invalid: Error: --raw cannot be used for muxing (mkv/m2ts) — encrypted data cannot be muxed. Use --raw only with an iso:// output (raw disc copy).
error.dest_needs_scheme: Error: '{dest}' has no URL scheme. Use a scheme:// prefix (e.g. mkv://{dest} for a single file), or pass an existing directory for multiple titles.
error.invalid_title: Error: invalid title '{value}' — titles are 1-based, must be a number >= 1.
error.unknown_flag: Error: unknown flag '{flag}'. Try 'freemkv help' for a list of options.
error.multi_title_needs_dir: Error: '{dest}' is a single-file destination, but multiple titles were selected. Pass a directory (e.g. a path ending in '/') so each title gets its own file.
error.interrupted_incomplete: Interrupted — output is incomplete and was not finalized.
error.E1001: Permission denied for {detail}. Add yourself to the disk group, or run the command with elevated privileges.
error.E1004: Could not reach the drive's command interface. Reconnect the drive and try again.
error.E1005: The drive is in use by another program. Close anything else using the disc and try again.
error.E1006: Could not open the drive on this system. Reconnect the drive and try again.
error.E2000: This drive isn't supported yet: {detail}. Run 'freemkv drive-info --share' to help add it.
error.E2002: Could not read the drive's capabilities. Reconnect the drive and try again.
error.E2003: This operating system isn't supported for direct drive access.
error.E2004: This drive type isn't supported yet.
error.E3001: The drive's firmware did not match the expected version. This drive may not be supported for unlocking.
error.E4000: The drive reported a command error ({detail}). The disc may be damaged, or the drive may need reconnecting.
error.E4001: Internal error while talking to the drive. Please report this.
error.E5000: A system I/O error occurred ({detail}). Check the destination has space and you have write access.
error.E6000: Could not read the disc at sector {detail}. The disc may be dirty or scratched — clean it and try again.
error.E6001: Could not read the disc's playlist data. The disc may be damaged or an unsupported format.
error.E6002: Could not read the disc's clip data. The disc may be damaged or an unsupported format.
error.E6003: File not found on the disc: {detail}
error.E6005: Title {detail} doesn't exist on this disc.
error.E6007: Could not read the disc's title structure. The disc may be damaged or an unsupported format.
error.E6011: The recovery map file is invalid or corrupted.
error.E6012: Internal error reading the disc. Please report this.
error.E7000: This disc needs AACS decryption keys, but no key source provided them.
error.E7001: The disc's security certificate is too short or invalid.
error.E7002: The drive would not start a secure session for this disc — it may be in use by another program. Close anything else using the disc and try again.
error.E7003: The drive rejected this disc's security certificate.
error.E7004: Could not read the disc's security certificate. The disc may be dirty or damaged.
error.E7005: The disc's security certificate could not be verified. The disc may be damaged or unsupported.
error.E7006: Could not read a decryption key from the disc. The disc may be dirty or damaged.
error.E7007: The drive rejected a decryption key for this disc.
error.E7008: A decryption key for this disc could not be verified.
error.E7009: Could not read the disc's identifier. The disc may be dirty or damaged.
error.E7010: The disc's identifier could not be verified. The disc may be damaged or unsupported.
error.E7011: Could not prepare this disc's decryption key.
error.E7014: CSS authentication failed: the drive could not establish the key exchange needed to decrypt this DVD. Try cleaning the disc and reinserting it. If the problem persists, your drive may not fully support CSS decryption.
error.E7015: The drive rejected the AACS host certificate, and this drive can't be unlocked another way.
error.E7016: This drive can't read the disc in the mode needed to decrypt it, and the secure session was refused. No way to decrypt this disc remains on this drive.
error.E7017: Could not read this disc's identifier, so it can't be decrypted. The disc may be dirty or damaged, or the drive may not support it.
error.E7018: No key source has a decryption key for this disc.
error.E7019: No key source has this disc's key.
error.E7020: This drive isn't recognized, so the steps needed to read this disc's identifier aren't available. Run 'freemkv drive-info --share' to help add it.
error.E7021: This drive doesn't provide a way to read this disc's identifier.
error.E7022: No key source has a decryption key for this disc (id: {hash}).
error.E7023: This disc is copy-protected and no key could be recovered for this title, so it can't be decrypted (the output would be unreadable).
error.E7024: No host certificate is available from any key source for the drive's secure handshake.
error.E8000: Cannot connect to the key database server: {detail}
error.E8001: Key database download failed (HTTP {detail}). Try again, or run: freemkv update-keys --url <keydb-url>
error.E8002: The key database is empty or invalid. Re-download it with: freemkv update-keys --url <keydb-url>
error.E8004: The key database could not be read. Re-download it with: freemkv update-keys --url <keydb-url>
error.E8006: The key database URL uses an address type that isn't supported ({detail}).
error.E8007: The key database download was redirected too many times. Check the URL and try again.
error.E9005: Internal error while building the output. Please report this.
error.E9006: The input data is corrupted or not in the expected format.
error.E9008: No information is available for this input.
error.E9009: Disc input can't be opened this way — this is an internal usage error.
error.E9010: The video stream's setup data could not be read. The source may be damaged or unsupported.
error.E9011: Internal error while building the output. Please report this.
error.E9012: This output format isn't supported yet.
error.E9013: Internal error: a processing step stopped unexpectedly. Please report this.
error.E9014: Timed out while finishing the output. Please try again.
error.E9015: Internal error: a processing step stopped unexpectedly. Please report this.
error.E9016: Internal error: a processing step stopped unexpectedly. Please report this.
error.E9017: Internal error while building the output. Please report this.
error.E9018: Internal error: a processing step stopped unexpectedly. Please report this.
error.E9020: The drive reported a disc size this version can't handle.
error.E9021: The output stream is malformed. Please report this.
error.E9022: The output destination resolved only to blocked addresses and was refused.
error.E9023: No video or audio was produced — the output would be an empty file. The input may be undecryptable or have no readable data.
error.E9030: Internal error while building the output. Please report this.
error.E9047: The drive returned an unreadable disc-size response. Reconnect the drive and try again.
error.keyserver_url_rejected: Error: key-service URL rejected ({error}) — online key source disabled for this rip.
error.key_url_bad_scheme: Error: --key-url requires an http:// or https:// URL (got '{value}').
error.info_unknown_url: '{url}' is not a valid URL — use scheme://path (e.g. disc://, mkv://movie.mkv).
error.usage_hint:
Usage: freemkv <source> <dest> [flags]
       freemkv info <url>

Try 'freemkv help' for more.
error.raw_iso_only: Error: --raw only applies to an iso:// output (it writes a raw, still-encrypted disc image). '{dest}' is not an iso:// destination. Rip to iso:// for a raw image, or drop --raw to decrypt + mux.
error.multipass_iso_only: Error: --multipass only applies to an iso:// output (multi-pass recovery writes a disc image with a mapfile). '{dest}' is not an iso:// destination. Rip to iso:// first (e.g. iso://disc.iso), then mux that ISO to mkv://.
error.source_needs_scheme: Error: '{source}' is not a usable source URL — use a recognized scheme:// prefix (e.g. iso://{source} for an ISO image, or disc:// for the optical drive).
error.iso_not_readable: Error: ISO input is not readable: '{path}' ({error}).
error.iso_is_dir: Error: ISO input '{path}' is a directory, not a file.
error.iso_empty: Error: ISO input '{path}' is empty (0 bytes) — not a valid disc image.
error.iso_invalid_image: Error: '{path}' is not a valid disc image (no readable UDF/ISO filesystem): {detail}.
error.dest_parent_missing: Error: output directory does not exist: '{path}'. Create it first, or choose an existing directory.
error.dest_not_writable: Error: output destination is not writable: '{path}' ({error}).
error.dest_is_dir_as_file: Error: output '{path}' is an existing directory, but a single file was expected. Choose a file path or end the destination with '/' for one-file-per-title.
error.dir_source_unsupported: Error: dir:// extraction needs a disc filesystem source (disc:// or iso://). '{source}' has no file tree. Rip a disc or ISO to a folder; for a single stream use mkv:// instead.
error.dir_dest_invalid: Error: '{dest}' is not a valid dir:// path. Use dir://<folder>/ to extract the decrypted file tree into a folder.
error.dir_dest_is_file: Error: dir:// target '{path}' is an existing file, not a folder. Choose a folder path for the extracted tree.
error.dir_dest_not_writable: Error: cannot create or write the dir:// target '{path}': {error}.
error.dir_dest_not_empty: Error: dir:// target '{path}' is not empty. Pass --force to extract into it anyway, or choose an empty folder.

url.scheme_note: All URLs require a scheme:// prefix.
url.path_note: File paths follow the scheme: mkv://./Movie.mkv, m2ts://./Movie.m2ts

ex.rip_mkv: freemkv disc:// mkv://Movie.mkv                     Rip disc to MKV
ex.rip_m2ts: freemkv disc:// m2ts://Movie.m2ts                   Rip disc to m2ts
ex.rip_drive: freemkv disc:///dev/sg4 mkv://Movie.mkv             Rip specific drive
ex.rip_title: freemkv disc:// mkv://Movie.mkv -t 1               Rip main feature only
ex.rip_titles: freemkv disc:// mkv://Movie.mkv -t 1 -t 3          Rip titles 1 and 3
ex.rip_iso: freemkv disc:// iso://Disc.iso                     Full disc to ISO (auto-resumes)
ex.rip_iso_raw: freemkv disc:// iso://Disc.iso --raw               Full disc, no decryption (auto-resumes)
ex.rip_iso_mp: freemkv disc:// iso://Disc.iso --multipass        Sweep with mapfile for multipass recovery
ex.rip_iso_patch: freemkv disc:// iso://Disc.iso --multipass        Re-run to patch bad sectors
ex.iso_to_mkv: freemkv iso://Disc.iso mkv://Movie.mkv             ISO to MKV
ex.remux: freemkv m2ts://Movie.m2ts mkv://Movie.mkv          Remux m2ts to MKV
ex.network: freemkv disc:// network://192.0.2.10:9000           Stream to network
ex.network_recv: freemkv network://0.0.0.0:9000 mkv://Movie.mkv    Receive from network
ex.stdio: freemkv disc:// stdio://                           Pipe to stdout
ex.benchmark: freemkv disc:// null://                            Benchmark read speed
ex.info: freemkv info disc://                               Show disc info
ex.rip_dir: freemkv iso://Disc.iso dir://Movie/           Extract decrypted file tree into a folder

flag.title: -t, --title N       Select title (1-based, repeatable). Default: all.
flag.key_url_2: With --keydb the keydb is tried first (local-
flag.key_url_3: first); alone it is the only key source.
flag.key_auth: --key-auth TOKEN Bearer token sent to the key service (optional).
flag.log_level_2: the terminal stays clean. Set it to write a
flag.log_level_3: diagnostic log to ./log.txt (use 3 for bug reports).
flag.log_file: --log-file PATH Write the diagnostic log to PATH instead of ./log.txt.
flag.force: --force        Extract into a non-empty dir:// target (overwrite)
